chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1229 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of main case 07-09-2023 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional A.G. ***** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. We have even otherwise seen the petition, filed for seeking possession of bungalow in Lady Willing Don Hospital, Khairpur, is not maintainable. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
